positive: Stylized, highly contrasting illustration of a mystical, majestic owl sitting on a gnarled branch, viewed in silhouette against a vibrant, bioluminescent nocturnal forest background. The owl should have large, expressive, glowing yellow eyes and intricate feather details that catch the light. Include stylized, subtly engraved constellations and crescent moons in the deep blue and purple sky. The overall composition must be clean, centralized, and designed for direct textile printing, utilizing strong linework and flat areas of deep color contrast. Moody, enchanted forest atmosphere, vector illustration aesthetic, ethereal glow, highly detailed, print-ready design.
negative: photorealistic, low resolution, blur, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, childish, messy, cropped
